items.title: US Stocks To Open On A Positive Note After A String Of Bad Mondays: Recent Dip Has 'Reached Its Low Point,' Says Technical Analyst
items.author: Rishabh Mishra
items.description: U.S. stock futures rose on Monday after Friday's sharp fall, with investors digesting tariff updates and earnings reports. Technical analysts suggest the recent dip in stocks may have reached its low point.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article mentions Applied Materials Inc. as one of the tech companies investors will be watching for updates, but does not provide any specific sentiment or outlook.
The article reports that Amazon.com Inc. reported stronger-than-expected fourth-quarter earnings, but its first-quarter sales guidance fell short of market expectations.
The article states that the Invesco QQQ Trust ETF experienced positive premarket trading on Monday, advancing 0.68%.
The article mentions that the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust rose 0.47% in premarket trading on Monday.
